## Summary

A short description of what the change does.

## Related issue

Fixes #issue or relates to #issue, if any.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

How did you verify the change works? Include steps to reproduce and any relevant logs.

- [ ] Built successfully with `mvn clean package`
- [ ] Tested on Paper 1.20.4
- [ ] Tested on Folia (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on Spigot 1.20.4 (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style
- [ ] I have added license headers to new files
- [ ] I have updated the wiki / config comments where relevant
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, tokens, or `.jar` build outputs
